name: python3-webcolors
title: python3-webcolors
summary: python3 library of color names and value formats
description:
python3 library of color names and value formats
For python3, support is included for the following formats, but this support
RGB colorspace only.
* Specification-defined color names
* Six-digit hexadecimal
* Three-digit hexadecimal
* Integer rgb() triplet
* Percentage rgb() triplet
This module conversion to/from HSL can be handled by the "colorsys" module in
the Python standard library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-webcolors because python3 library of color names and value formats.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-webcolors as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-webcolors with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-webcolors --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
